title: SYRINGE EXCHANGE PROGRAM - 211info
text: JACKSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH SYRINGE EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include used points exchange for new points, wound care supplies, safer sex supplies, risk reduction counseling, and referrals to medical care services, such as sexually transmitted disease screening, HIV testing, mental health services, alcohol and drug treatment, medication assisted treatment, and naloxone. 140 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Intravenous drug users age 18 and older, none for HIV testing Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 2pm-4pm HIV testing by appointment: Monday-Friday 9-11am, 1pm-4pm Email (541) 774-8209 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 774-8209 Public Health Department Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling HIV Testing Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Opioid Antidote Distribution Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JACKSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
